name: Upside-Down Rhubarb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter, rhubarb, and brown sugar in a small bowl and mix well. Place the mixture in 12 greased muffin cups.
2. Beat together the soft butter, sugar, and egg until fluffy. Gradually combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg with the creamed mixture alternately with milk. Stir just to moisten.
3. Spoon the batter on top of the rhubarb mixture in each muffin cup.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes. Invert the pan over the muffins for a few minutes so that any excess rhubarb runs out.
5. Serve warm.
